short_description: Data Science Team Access to Enterprise Production Buckets
description:
Request IAM permissions for DataScienceRole to read from all epro-* S3 buckets for analytics and ML model training.

Requirements:
- Role: DataScienceRole
- Access Pattern: Read-only access to all buckets matching epro-* pattern
- Bucket Pattern: epro-*
- Operations Needed: s3:GetObject, s3:ListBucket
- Environment: Production
- Business Justification: Data science team needs access to enterprise production data for analytics, reporting, and machine learning model training
- Security Requirements: Read-only access only, no write/delete permissions
- Compliance: Must follow least-privilege principle
- Duration: Permanent access for ongoing analytics work

work_notes.author: john.doe@company.com
work_notes.note: Initial assessment: Standard IAM policy creation for read-only access

work_notes.author: security.team@company.com
work_notes.note: Security review: Approved for read-only access with condition to use secure transport

related_tickets: INC0012345 - Data Science team unable to access production analytics data
business_impact: Medium - Delays in analytics and ML model development if not resolved
